## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Main
    participant SparkContext
    participant SQLContext
    participant EntityActualTripLegPlow
    participant S3

    Main->>Main: Parse arguments
    Main->>SparkContext: Initialize(master=yarn, appName=plowTests)
    SparkContext-->>Main: sc
    Main->>SparkContext: Configure spark.sql.legacy.parquet.int96RebaseModeInWrite
    Main->>SQLContext: Initialize(sc)
    SQLContext-->>Main: sqlCtx
    Main->>Main: Start timer
    Main->>EntityActualTripLegPlow: Create instance(sqlCtx, env)
    EntityActualTripLegPlow-->>Main: eat
    Main->>EntityActualTripLegPlow: doTransformations()
    EntityActualTripLegPlow-->>Main: Transformations complete
    Main->>S3: Write eat.df to s3_output_path
    S3-->>Main: Write complete
    Main->>S3: Read parquet from s3_output_path
    S3-->>Main: eat_df
    Main->>Main: get_latest_path(s3_output_path)
    Main->>S3: Write eat_df to latest_s3_output_path
    S3-->>Main: Write complete
    Main->>Main: Calculate and print elapsed time
```
